turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello? Uh, mujhe ek dermatologist se appointment chahiye. Skin allergy ka issue hai mujhe.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Haan zaroor. Hamare paas Dr. Sneha Marathe hain dermatology department mein. Aapko kab convenient rahega?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Tuesday ko 4 PM aur Wednesday ko 11 AM available hai Dr. Marathe ke saath. Kaun sa prefer karenge?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Tuesday 4 PM. Naam hai mera Pranav Deshpande, number 9823456789.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Done! Appointment confirmed — Pranav Deshpande, Dr. Sneha Marathe, next Tuesday 4 PM. SMS confirmation aayega.
